topic: Indian activist on hunger strike remains stable
headline: SONAM WANGCHUK STAYS FOCUSED, ENTERS 18TH DAY OF HUNGER STRIKE DEMANDING EDUCATION MINISTER'S RESIGNATION
summary: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk remains stable while on a hunger strike, which has entered its 18th day, as he demands the resignation of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over alleged irregularities in exams. Despite deteriorating health concerns and growing demands to end his fast, Wangchuk continues his strike. A medical team is attending to him around the clock. His condition is being closely monitored, with his blood pressure recorded at 109/70 and having lost over 8 kilograms.
